name: df-vision
description: Local stub for appclaw's df-vision dependency. The real df-vision was unpublished from npm (only a security-holder placeholder remains), so `npm i appclaw` fails for every version. df-vision powers appclaw's VISION mode only; declarative YAML flows are DOM-based and never call it, so this stub lets appclaw install and run flows. It throws a clear error if vision is actually invoked.
